name: 김회장
visual_description_ko: 70대 초반의 한국인 남성. 깊게 패인 주름과 검버섯이 있는 햇볕에 그을린 피부, 숱이 적고 흰색에 가까운 짧은 스포츠형 머리. 낡은 작업복 차림에 눌러쓴 낡은 모자 아래로 보이는 날카로운 눈매.
visual_description_en: A Korean man in his early 70s. Weathered and tanned skin with deep wrinkles and age spots. Short, sparse hair, almost white, in a crew cut style. Sharp eyes visible beneath a worn, old cap and work clothes.
fixed_anchor_prompt: A real Korean man in his 70s, short white hair, worn work clothes, natural Korean features, pure ivory skin tone, professional portrait photography, detailed wrinkles.
